text: More about SWORM This image from June 20, 2013, at 11:15 p.m. EDT shows the bright light of a solar flare on the left side of the sun and an eruption of solar material shooting through the sun’s atmosphere, called a prominence eruption. Shortly thereafter, this same region of the sun sent a coronal mass ejection out into space. ROSES 2025 R2O2R Proposers' Teleconference Recording Recording of the July 31, 2025 R2O2R Proposers' Teleconference hosted by NASA's Heliophysics Division.
